title: lopholoma alpestris
intro: Lopholoma alpestris, also known as the alpine lopholoma, is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lopholoma alpestris include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often extracted in the form of infusions or tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits.
